title: Tabular Data Metadata
description:
Tabular dataset description.

This metadata schema provides a structured framework for defining and describing tabular data files used clinical research contexts. It enables clear, standardised documentation of file identity, integrity, and structure, as well as detailed characterisation of each field within the dataset. The schema captures essential information needed to interpret fields/variables, assess data suitability, ensure consistent field definitions, and support harmonisation across datasets. This schema is intended to support reproducibility, interoperability, and transparent documentation, enabling downstream validation, dataset comparison, and integration into broader analytical workflows.

Complete all applicable fields based on the available documentation and knowledge of the dataset.

fileLabel.title: File Label
fileLabel.description: Human-readable file label. Must contain only letters, numbers, or underscores. *Maximum length*: 255 characters.

fields.title: Fields
fields.description: List of fields/variables in the tabular data. *Maximum number* of fields: 100,000.

fields.label: MyocardialInfarction
fields.description: Myocardial infarction event during the follow-up

fields.label: Age
fields.description: Patient age in years at baseline.
